<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Creates a binding request ID.

## Import

```ts
import { bindingRequestId } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs";
```

## Signature

```ts
function bindingRequestId(
	host: THost,
	binding: NestBoundaryBindingMeta,
	fallback?: string | ((host: THost) => string | undefined),
): string | undefined
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `host` | `THost` | Host object from the framework boundary. |
| `binding` | `NestBoundaryBindingMeta` | Nest boundary binding metadata. |
| `fallback` | `string \| ((host: THost) => string \| undefined)` | fallback value used by the helper. |

## Returns

The binding request ID result.

## Example

```ts
import { bindingRequestId } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/adapters/nestjs.ts`
